$schema_comment: Machine-readable browser storage contract for the web reference client.

relayUrl.description: Normalized relay websocket url, usually ending in /ws

gatewayPubKey.description: Pinned gateway public key in base64

client_id.description: Stable opaque relay-side client identifier persisted across reloads

id.description: Constant record id for the single browser identity

fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the public key

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of first identity persistence

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of last identity write

identity_keypair_runtime.lifecycle: metadata may be discovered during app init; the keypair itself is imported into runtime memory on connect and reused across reconnects

session_key.lifecycle: derived per connection, cleared on disconnect/close

channel_token.lifecycle: held in RelayConnection memory for the active connection lifecycle; cleared on disconnect/reload

security_rules: channelToken is a bearer secret and must never be persisted
identity private key must never be written to localStorage
identity private key may be persisted only inside the IndexedDB identity store for same-browser reuse
session key must not be persisted
gateway public key is safe to persist but security-relevant
